_comment: These thresholds are a CI regression floor, not a production target.
CI runs against the storefront with the SMMTA-NEXT API stubbed → the
catalogue read returns empty, no real product images load, every run
is cold (no warm caches, no service-worker reuse). Empty content also
tends to dock Accessibility / SEO scores in subtle ways (no landmark
fills, fewer headings to weight, no semantic image alts).
The real production target (per Prompt 13) is Performance / SEO /
Accessibility >= 0.95 against the live storefront with real catalogue
+ CDN-cached images. The CI floor here is a flat 0.7 across the four
categories so the workflow catches catastrophic regressions without
blocking PRs on the inherent CI-vs-production gap. Bump these up as
the empty-state score improves over time — track the actual numbers
in each PR run, lift the floor when it's been comfortably above for
